response.original_title: {{Cruise~Travel~Guide}} Can i upgrade my cabin on MSC Cruise ship in 2026 Ultimate Cabin Upgrade Handbook
response.overview: MSC offers cabin upgrades primarily through the MSC Upgrade program, +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) an automated bidding system, or occasionally via paid upgrades, rather than free, spontaneous upgrades. Yes, +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) you can upgrade your cabin on MSC, either by bidding through the MSC Upgrade program or by requesting a paid upgrade directly through customer service. You can call MSC directly at +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) to upgrade. Typically, +1-866-829-1280(US) you will pay the difference between the fare you originally paid and the price of the higher category at the time of your initial booking. MSC cabin upgrades are mainly +1-866-829-1280(US) handled through the "MSC Upgrade Program," a bidding system where guests submit offers for higher stateroom categories. You can call MSC directly at +1-866-829-1280 to pay to upgrade cabin.
